description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with the docker:stable-dind service and a before_script that logs in to the registry using $REGISTRY_USER and $REGISTRY_TOKEN. Define a single stage called digits and global variables OS set to $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME and REPOSITORY set to $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE/$CI_PROJECT_NAME. Add five jobs named v3.0, v3.3, v4.0, v5.0 and v6.0, all in the digits stage, each executing the same script: extract VERSION from CI_BUILD_NAME by stripping the leading character, run docker build -t "$REPOSITORY:$VERSION" --build-arg "repository=nvidia/caffe" "$VERSION", if the variable LATEST is true then tag the image as "$REPOSITORY:latest", and finally docker push "$REPOSITORY". The v6.0 job sets LATEST='true' to also push a latest tag, while the other jobs do not set LATEST. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
